summary: Optimized build_frame_constraints: removed classical_truth tautology (Or(P,Not(P))), reordered world_interval before lawful in return list for MBQI seeding, added max_memory=4096MB guard to Z3SolverAdapter. Test suite: 43/43 passing, ~46% faster (93s->50s). Tested and reverted: world_uniqueness array inequality (8 regressions - array disequality checks all indices not just shared interval), lawful/converse MultiPattern annotations (2 regressions - pattern too restrictive for countermodel SAT search), qi.max_instances cap (2 regressions - countermodel examples need >100000 instantiations).
